methods.boolean equals(Object obj): Check if this size is equal to another size.
methods.float getHeight(): Get the height of the size (as an arbitrary unit).
methods.float getWidth(): Get the width of the size (as an arbitrary unit).
methods.int hashCode(): Returns a hash code value for the object.
methods.SizeF parseSizeF(String string): Parses the specified string as a size value.
methods.String toString(): Return the size represented as a string with the format "WxH"
methods.void writeToParcel(Parcel out, int flags: Write this size to the specified parcel.
